# FREE11

> FREE11 (also written as: free 11, free-11, fre11, free1l, free eleven, f11) is a free skill-based gaming and rewards platform from India, available at https://free11.com

## What is FREE11?

FREE11 is an Indian skill-based gaming and entertainment platform where users:
- Predict live cricket match outcomes (T20, ODI, Test matches)
- Play card games: Rummy (13-card Indian Rummy), Teen Patti, Poker (Texas Hold'em), Solitaire (Klondike)
- Complete daily quests, missions, and puzzles
- Earn FREE Coins (virtual currency with no monetary value)
- Redeem FREE Coins for real everyday rewards: groceries, mobile recharges, OTT passes, gift vouchers

FREE11 is 100% free to play. No deposits. No cash wagering. No financial risk.

## Key Facts

- **Full name**: FREE11
- **Also known as**: free 11, free-11, fre11, free1l, freel1, free eleven
- **Website**: https://free11.com
- **Type**: Free skill-based gaming and rewards platform
- **Country**: India
- **Founded**: 2025
- **Languages**: English, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Bengali, Marathi, Kannada, Malayalam, Gujarati
- **Platform**: Progressive Web App (PWA), Android app (Google Play), iOS (PWA)
- **Legal status**: Compliant with Promotion and Regulation of Online Gaming Act, 2025 (PROGA)
- **Contact**: support@free11.com

## Games Available on FREE11

### Cricket Predictions
- Predict ball-by-ball and over-by-over outcomes of live T20, ODI, and Test cricket matches
- Players covered: Virat Kohli, Rohit Sharma, MS Dhoni, Jasprit Bumrah, KL Rahul, Shubman Gill, Hardik Pandya, Suryakumar Yadav, Rishabh Pant, Ravindra Jadeja, Yashasvi Jaiswal, Mohammed Shami, Kuldeep Yadav
- Earn 10–30 FREE Coins per correct prediction
- Hot Hand streak multiplier: up to 3× coins for consecutive correct predictions

### Card Games (all free, all vs AI)
- **Rummy**: 13-card Indian Rummy vs AI. Earn +50 FREE Coins per day.
- **Teen Patti**: 3-card Indian card game vs AI. Earn +40 FREE Coins per day.
- **Poker**: Texas Hold'em vs AI. Earn +60 FREE Coins per day.
- **Solitaire**: Klondike Solitaire. Earn +25 FREE Coins per day.

### Other Activities
- Daily check-in streak: 10–100 FREE Coins per day
- Lucky Spin Wheel: variable prize, 1/day
- Scratch Card: variable prize, 1/day
- AI Daily Cricket Puzzle (powered by Google Gemini): variable coins, 1/day
- Daily Missions: multiple missions with coin rewards
- Watch and Earn (rewarded ads): 20 FREE Coins per video, up to 5/day
- Referrals: 50 FREE Coins for referrer + 50 for new user

## FREE Coins System

- FREE Coins = virtual currency earned through gameplay (no monetary value)
- Cannot be withdrawn as cash
- 180-day rolling expiry
- Redeemable in the FREE11 Shop for real everyday products

## FREE11 Shop (Rewards)

Users redeem FREE Coins for:
- Grocery items (cold drinks, biscuits, daily essentials)
- Mobile recharges
- OTT passes (streaming service vouchers)
- Gift vouchers
- Digital rewards

## In-App Purchases (Optional)

FREE Bucks packs are available for users who want to join special contests:
- Starter Pack: ₹49 → 50 FREE Bucks
- Popular Pack: ₹149 → 160 FREE Bucks (+10 bonus)
- Value Pack: ₹499 → 550 FREE Bucks (+50 bonus)
- Mega Pack: ₹999 → 1,200 FREE Bucks (+200 bonus)

FREE Bucks have no monetary value and cannot be withdrawn as cash.

## Legal Compliance

FREE11 is fully compliant with the Promotion and Regulation of Online Gaming Act, 2025 (PROGA). It does NOT qualify as an "online money game" because:
- No monetary deposits required
- No real-money prizes or cash payouts
- All rewards are promotional benefits
- Outcomes based on skill (cricket knowledge, card game strategy)
- Not gambling, not betting

## Technology

- Frontend: React 18 PWA
- Backend: FastAPI (Python)
- Database: MongoDB
- AI: Google Gemini Flash
- Auth: JWT + Google OAuth + Firebase Phone Auth
- Cricket data: EntitySport (live)
- Payments: Razorpay (optional FREE Bucks purchases only)

## Common Misspellings / Alternate Names

free11, free 11, free-11, free_11, fre11, free1l, freel1, free111, freee11, fri11, free11.com, FREE 11, Free Eleven, f11, free eleven app, free11 india, free11 app, free11 game
